name: Memora
summary: Immersive language learning with Rokid glasses HUD and Baidu AI
description: Memora is an Android app for Rokid AR glasses that offers four language learning modes using AI-driven scenario dialogues, visual recognition, mnemonics, and spaced repetition. It connects via Bluetooth to display content on the glasses HUD and uses Baidu AI for speech and vision processing.
author: e7naq3y

listing.descriptionMarkdown:
About Memora

Memora is an immersive language learning app designed for Rokid AR glasses. It uses a heads-up display (HUD) to present learning content in real time, integrating Baidu AI for intelligent scenario dialogues and image recognition.

Key Features

- Four learning modes: scenario dialogue, visual recognition, AI-generated mnemonics, and spaced repetition (SRS).
- Scenario dialogue mode enables multi-turn AI conversations with voice input and HUD subtitles.
- Visual recognition mode captures images via glasses and extracts keywords using AI.
- Personalized mnemonic hints help memorize difficult vocabulary.
- Spaced repetition schedules reviews based on the Ebbinghaus curve with adjustable intensity.

App Interface

- Learning data dashboard with statistics, vocabulary radar, and review calendar.
- Multi-language vocabulary management and daily goal settings.
- AI chat coach providing learning analysis and review suggestions.
- Device management for Bluetooth connection, HUD control, and media recording.

Rokid Glasses Integration

- Bluetooth device management including battery, brightness, and volume.
- Custom HUD views with smooth incremental updates.
- Audio/video recording and Wi-Fi P2P media synchronization.

Requirements

- Android phone with Bluetooth to connect Rokid AR glasses.
- Rokid AR glasses for HUD display (app UI can run without glasses).
